bio: I am a Mechanical Engineering student at Institut Teknologi Bandung with a strong focus on integrating industrial maintenance systems with information technology.
My experience spans power-plant maintenance analysis at PLN Indonesia Power and digital transformation leadership in student organizations, where I build practical systems for real operational needs.
I work across engineering and software to deliver data-driven solutions using tools like Next.js, Python, and SQL, while managing multidisciplinary projects with clear execution.

education.description: Current GPA: 3.9/4.00. Focused on mechanical systems, maintenance reliability, and applied digital workflows for technical operations.
